title: App Settings - General - Account - Invite sent, user logs during the installation, not registered on Cloud
scenario: IT admin sends invite to mobile user; user installs app and logs in via mobile without accepting invite externally, resulting in no tenant assigned despite invite appearing in General/Account.
steps: IT admin sends an invite to a mobile user.
User does not accept the invite via an external source (e.g., laptop).
User installs the app on their mobile phone.
User checks the card for Tenant ID/Name rows.
Admin checks the tenant info on cloud to see if the mobile user is registered.
User navigates to General/Account in the app.
expected: The user should be fully registered with the tenant. Tenant ID/Name rows should be present on the card in Poly Support/App, and the cloud should show the mobile user as registered.
